category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a memory profiler for Python applications; official Memray docs identify it as a Python memory profiler.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title and GitHub repository use “Memray”; source_facts.name is memray.
docs_sources: Official Bloomberg GitHub Pages documentation provides landing, getting started, and API pages.
repo_sources: Official Memray documentation links to the Bloomberg GitHub project; GitHub repository describes Memray as a memory profiler for Python.
tags_sources: Official docs describe Python and native allocation tracking; GitHub topics include python, profiler, memory, memory-profiler, and memory-leak-detection; source_facts.executables lists CLI commands.
